title: Cuneiform Tablet #0586: Old Babylonian Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
